nodes.label: AI for standard automation wrapper code
nodes.label_negative: AI for business logic and calculations
nodes.grounding_span: To write Excel VBA code for such standard automation tasks as open every file in this folder

nodes.label: Self-written business logic for maintainability
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write these myself rather than delegating to AI and then checking

nodes.label: AI adherence to personal coding conventions
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from personal coding style
nodes.grounding_span: I then need to go back to ask it to apply my preferred coding conventions particularly in the case of naming variables

nodes.label: AI as productivity booster for routine code
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to foundational coding skills
nodes.grounding_span: Ai can write this 'wrapper' code quickly an effectively

nodes.label: Human as driver of development process
nodes.grounding_span: I am still the driver of the development process

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: Ai can write this 'wrapper' code quickly an effectively

nodes.label: Maintainability and debugging ease
nodes.grounding_span: This makes updating and debugging easier for me

nodes.label: Professional competence and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: the skill is in knowing what AI can be best asked to do

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for wrapper code
nodes.grounding_span: Ai can write this 'wrapper' code quickly an effectively. This is satisfying.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's variable naming
nodes.grounding_span: What is frustrating is that I then need to go back to ask it to apply my preferred coding conventions

nodes.label: Confidence in human-driven development
nodes.grounding_span: I am still the driver of the development process

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth interaction
nodes.grounding_span: Going back and forth sounds closer to what I do

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: I use what Ai produces as a wrapper for the 'action' parts of my code
